notes: 2026-06-16 NIGHTLY: ROOT CAUSE FOUND for week-long trade drought. A flawed nightly heuristic (global WR=31% < 50% on N trades -> bump MIN_SCORE) ratcheted min_score 8->9->9->9->9->10->10 over the past 6 sessions, overriding the repeatedly-validated per-score EV analysis (score 8 EV +31.8%/trade vs score 9 +8.7% vs score 10 +4.6% -- 3-7x worse). Global WR is the wrong metric to gate on: it mixes all score bands and is dominated by the worst ones once the threshold drifts up. Combined with the live.py circuit-breaker (+2 after 6/8 recent losses, currently active), effective MIN_SCORE hit ~12/13, explaining zero trades for several days despite ADX>30 conditions occurring daily. FIX APPLIED: min_score reverted to 8 (decisive, repeated evidence across 6 prior sessions). RULE FOR FUTURE SESSIONS: never raise min_score based on overall win rate alone. Only change it based on the per-score EV table in full_report(). NOT APPLIED: wanted to tighten fvg_bear_short -1 -> -2 (shorts WITH bearish FVG present still WR 21%/3W-11L vs WITHOUT 38%/3W-5L) but the trader.py code edit was blocked by permission denial this session (sandbox/tooling, not a data reason) -- left config and code both at -1 so they stay consistent. Revisit fvg_bear_short=-2 next session if write access to trader.py score_setup() is available.
